# LICENSE NOTE — `templates/` (Tailwind UI)

Full-page Tailwind UI-aesthetic templates (dashboard, pricing, sign-in, checkout, settings, 404, landing, blog list, blog post, contact, profile, invoice, reports, inbox, calendar, docs, analytics, product detail, team, project overview, onboarding, billing).

Clean-room reconstruction from published Tailwind docs + conventions. No paid-source extraction. See `../LICENSE_NOTE.md` for full provenance trail.
